_meta.description: Active listings (currently for sale on PropertyGuru). Different from data/listings.json which is the closed-deal track record.
_meta.edit: Add/remove entries here when your active inventory changes. Reorder to control display order. To swap a hero photo, change the `hero` path to point to a different file inside the listing's folder.

fields.id: Stable slug (used for the folder under Listings/)
fields.address: Street address — shown as card title
fields.town: HDB town — used for chip and SEO
fields.priceFull: Numeric price for sorting / WhatsApp prefill, e.g. 'S$ 440,000'
fields.tagline: Punchy 1-liner — the PropertyGuru listing's About headline
fields.badges: Array of short tags shown on the photo (e.g. 'HIGH FLOOR', 'RENOVATED', 'CORNER UNIT')
fields.hero: Path to the hero photo (resolved from repo root)
fields.propertyGuruUrl: Full link to the PropertyGuru listing page

listings.tagline: High floor, renovated, unblocked greenery view
Walk to Waterway Point & Punggol MRT, well-maintained
High floor, corner unit, walk to Soo Teck LRT & Waterway Point
